sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n19453" key="baru/nwtos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">βᾰρύ-νωτος</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ῠ], <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>,</foreign> <sense id="n19453.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with heavy back,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">κόγχαι</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1342.tlg001:76" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Emp.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">76</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
